# Introduction to Snapshot Testing in R

This is the well-known discovery copy for agentic assistants.

Canonical slides: https://www.indrapatil.com/intro-to-snapshot-testing/
Root llms.txt: https://www.indrapatil.com/intro-to-snapshot-testing/llms.txt
Root llms-full.txt: https://www.indrapatil.com/intro-to-snapshot-testing/llms-full.txt
Source: https://github.com/IndrajeetPatil/intro-to-snapshot-testing/

Summary: A comprehensive guide to snapshot testing in R using testthat, vdiffr, and shinytest2. Learn how to test text outputs, graphical outputs, and Shiny applications with automated testing.
